eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus favors Kylian Mbappé at 17% implied probability for 2026 FIFA World Cup Golden Boot, buoyed by his Real Madrid output despite a late-April hamstring injury sidelining him for the club season's end, with France now monitoring his recovery ahead of the June 11 kickoff. Harry Kane's blistering 2026 form—24 goals across competitions, leading Europe's scoring charts—has closed the gap to 12%, underscoring England's group-stage potency. Erling Haaland's 16 qualifier goals propelled Norway but recent Manchester City dip tempers his 7.5% share, while Spain's Lamine Yamal (6.1%) and Ousmane Dembélé (6.7%) surge on youth and Nations League momentum. Veterans like Messi and Ronaldo linger at 6% amid the expanded 48-team format's goal-friendly groups, keeping the race wide open with no dominant frontrunner.

markets.question: Spread: FC Barcelona (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming La Liga game, scheduled for May 17 at 1:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "FC Barcelona" if FC Barcelona win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Real Betis Balompié".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on laliga.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: FC Barcelona vs. Real Betis Balompié - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the La Liga game, scheduled for May 17 at 1:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Barcelona lead La Liga standings by 11 points over Real Madrid entering matchday 37, hosting fifth-placed Real Betis at Spotify Camp Nou on May 17 in a fixture with title implications for the hosts and European qualification stakes for the visitors. Barca's dominance is tempered by an injury crisis, with star winger Lamine Yamal sidelined for the season via hamstring tear, though Raphinha and Andreas Christensen recently resumed full training ahead of their May 3 Osasuna clash; doubts linger over Christensen's partial ACL recovery. Betis boast solid away form after stunning Real Madrid in late April but face absences including defender Marc Bartra (foot, late May) and Junior Firpo (muscle). Historical head-to-head favors Barcelona (30 wins in 46 meetings), with home advantage and superior goal difference underscoring trader focus on squad depth and motivation.

eventMetadata.context_description: President Trump's arrival in Beijing on May 13, 2026, for a bilateral summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping, scheduled for May 14-15, dominates trader focus on his 2026 foreign leader meetings, amid tensions over US-China tariffs, Taiwan arms sales, AI competition, and the Iran conflict. White House officials confirmed the trip's emphasis on high-stakes diplomacy, with Trump highlighting US technological leadership beforehand. Earlier 2026 engagements included talks with India's PM Modi and UK royals, but this visit marks the year's most anticipated. Upcoming catalysts include the G7 summit June 15-17, G20 in Miami later, a potential reciprocal Xi US visit in Q3-Q4, and midterm election pressures constraining the presidential schedule through November.

markets.question: Will Starmer say "Liz" or "Truss" during the next Prime Minister's Questions event?
markets.description:
Keir Starmer is scheduled to participate in the Prime Minister's Questions (PMQs) in the Commons Chamber in the Palace of Westminster on every Wednesday. (https://www.parliament.uk/visiting/visiting-and-tours/watch-committees-and-debates/prime-ministers-questions/).

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Keir Starmer says the listed term during the next Prime Minister's Question Time event he participates in. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

Any usage of the term regardless of context will count toward the resolution of this market.

Pluralization/possessive of the term will count toward the resolution of this market, however other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

AI-generated audio or video will not count toward this market's resolution.

If no such Prime Minister's Question Time event happens by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No". If Starmer ceases to be Prime Minister for any length of time by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

This market is explicitly about scheduled events featuring Keir Starmer titled "Prime Minister's Question Time" (https://www.parallelparliament.co.uk/mp/keir-starmer/dept/cabinet-office/calendar). Speeches, events, or comments that occur outside of named, scheduled events will not qualify toward this market's resolution. If the event contains a Q&A, it will count toward the resolution of this market.

The resolution source will be video of the events. Only remarks which are broadcast or streamed live will count toward this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Keir Starmer faces acute pressure at the upcoming Prime Minister's Questions on May 20, amid speculation of cabinet resignations—including Health Secretary Wes Streeting—and over 70 Labour MPs urging leadership change following budget fallout and dismal polls. The King's Speech delivered today by King Charles outlined the government's agenda on growth, defence spending, Europe relations, and energy security, but opposition leader Kemi Badenoch dismissed Starmer as "in office but not in power," highlighting Labour infighting and delivery doubts. Traders weigh Starmer's likely scripted responses to standard attacks on economic inheritance, Conservative chaos, and internal rebellions, drawing from his May 11 vow for "bigger responses" than anticipated, with phrasing patterns from recent bruising PMQs sessions in the House of Commons poised to dominate bets.

Ballots mail soon, early in-person voting starts May 29; absent Republican unity, traders anticipate Democratic dominance in the nonpartisan primary.

markets.question: Will Lance Stroll be the 2026 F1 Drivers' Champion?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the listed driver that finishes 1st in the driver standings for the 2026 F1 season.

This market will resolve as soon as the official results of the final scheduled race of the 2026 F1 season are known.

If multiple drivers tie for first place in the drivers standings, this market will resolve according to the tiebreak procedure used by F1 to determine the 2026 F1 Drivers’ champion.

If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed driver to win the 2026 F1 Drivers Championship based on the rules of F1 (e.g., they are mathematically eliminated from contention), the corresponding market will resolve to “No”.

If the F1 season is permanently canceled or has not been completed by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from Formula 1.

eventMetadata.context_description: Mercedes teammates Kimi Antonelli and George Russell dominate trader consensus for the 2026 F1 Drivers' Championship, with Antonelli's 37.4% implied probability edging Russell's 29.5% after his third consecutive Grand Prix victory in Miami on May 3, extending his points lead to 100-80. McLaren's Lando Norris (11.5%) trails after podiums but faces upgrades from Ferrari and Red Bull challengers like Charles Leclerc and Max Verstappen, tightening the 24-race battle as development wars intensify post-Miami.

Close challengers France's Monroe ("Regarde!") and Czechia's Daniel Žižka ("Crossroads") shine with operatic polish and flawless vocals plus a heartbeat-effect finale, while Denmark's Søren Torpegaard nails soaring notes and Finland's Linda Lampenius & Pete Parkkonen leverage SF1 jury show vocal prowess. This wide-open field reflects jury preferences for composition and production over spectacle, with votes locking post-final rehearsals ahead of Saturday's Grand Final.

markets.question: Will Argentina’s monthly inflation in April 2026 be between 2.5% and 2.7%?
markets.description:
This is a market about the monthly variation of consumer prices in Argentina, before seasonal adjustment, as reported by the National Institute of Statistics and Census (INDEC) of Argentina.

This market will resolve according to the monthly percentage change in the Consumer Price Index (CPI / IPC) in April 2026 (Variación % mensual Total nacional), according to the monthly INDEC report.

The resolution source for this market will be the INDEC Consumer Price Index report released for April 2026 (https://www.indec.gob.ar/), currently scheduled to be released on May 14, 2026. 

Resolution of this market will take place upon release of the aforementioned data. If no data for the specified month is released by the date the next month's data is scheduled to be released, this market will resolve based on data from the last available month.

You can find this report by clicking on the “Precios al Consumidor” option on the home page of https://www.indec.gob.ar/, and searching the PDF for the figure under “Variación % mensual Total nacional”.

Note: the resolution source for this market will be the official monthly INDEC CPI (IPC) news release, which reports monthly inflation change to only one decimal point (e.g., 1.9%). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

events.title: Argentina Monthly Inflation - April
events.description:
This is a market about the monthly variation of consumer prices in Argentina, before seasonal adjustment, as reported by the National Institute of Statistics and Census (INDEC) of Argentina.

This market will resolve according to the monthly percentage change in the Consumer Price Index (CPI / IPC) in April 2026 (Variación % mensual Total nacional), according to the monthly INDEC report.

The resolution source for this market will be the INDEC Consumer Price Index report released for April 2026 (https://www.indec.gob.ar/), currently scheduled to be released on May 14, 2026. 

Resolution of this market will take place upon release of the aforementioned data. If no data for the specified month is released by the date the next month's data is scheduled to be released, this market will resolve based on data from the last available month.

You can find this report by clicking on the “Precios al Consumidor” option on the home page of https://www.indec.gob.ar/, and searching the PDF for the figure under “Variación % mensual Total nacional”.

Note: the resolution source for this market will be the official monthly INDEC CPI (IPC) news release, which reports monthly inflation change to only one decimal point (e.g., 1.9%). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices a 60% implied probability for Argentina's April 2026 monthly CPI in the 2.5–2.7% range, closely tracking the Central Bank's latest REM survey median forecast of 2.6% (top-10 analysts at 2.7%), released May 7. This positioning reflects optimism for disinflation resuming after March's unexpected 3.4% print—the highest in a year—driven by regulated price adjustments and seasonal factors, amid Milei's fiscal surplus and monetary contraction shrinking money supply at double-digit rates. Lower buckets like 2.2–2.4% (23%) and 2.8–3.0% (18%) capture uncertainty around food prices and utility pass-throughs, with INDEC's official release due mid-May as the key catalyst. Annual inflation holds at 32.6% y/y, down sharply from prior peaks.

markets.question: Solstice FDV above $200M one day after launch?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Fully Diluted Valuation of Solstice's governance token is greater than the value specified in the title 1 day after launch. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No."

The token must be actively, publicly transferable and tradable to be considered a launch.

The FDV will be determined using the total token supply multiplied by the token price.

"1 day after launch" is defined as 4:00 PM ET on the calendar day following launch. The resolution source for this market is the most liquid price source available. If Solstice (https://x.com/solsticefi) doesn't launch a token by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

markets.question: Will Jerome Powell depart as Fed Chair between June 20 and June 26?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the listed date range during which Jerome Powell vacates his role as Chair of the Federal Reserve Board of Governors.

Vacating his role refers to Powell actually ceasing to hold the position of Chair of the Federal Reserve Board of Governors. Announcements of Powell's resignation or firing will not alone qualify.

The scheduled end of Powell’s term as Chair will not alone qualify. If Powell continues to serve as Chair on a temporary basis (e.g. until the confirmation of his successor), he will not be considered to have vacated his role as Chair.

This market is restricted to Powell’s status as Chair of the Federal Reserve Board of Governors. Powell’s status as a regular member of the Federal Reserve Board of Governors will not affect this market’s resolution.

All dates refer to the Eastern Time zone (ET).

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from Jerome Powell and the Federal Reserve; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Jerome Powell's term as Federal Reserve Chair expires May 15, driving trader consensus to price a 96.5% implied probability of his departure in the May 15–22 window, reinforced by today's Senate confirmation of Kevin Warsh as his successor, who takes over after Powell's planned step-aside. Powell confirmed in late April he will relinquish the chairmanship at term end while remaining on the Board of Governors until at least 2028 amid ongoing legal challenges from the Trump administration. This reflects historical norms where chairs transition promptly post-term without reappointment, with Warsh's first FOMC meeting slated for June 16–17. Barring delays in Warsh's swearing-in, procedural holds, or unforeseen legal interventions, the handover aligns with the dominant market positioning.

markets.question: Valencia CF vs. Rayo Vallecano de Madrid: O/U 5.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming La Liga game between Valencia CF and Rayo Vallecano de Madrid, scheduled for May 14 at 1:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Valencia CF and Rayo Vallecano de Madrid combine to score 6 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 6, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on laliga.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Valencia CF vs. Rayo Vallecano de Madrid - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the La Liga game, scheduled for May 14 at 1:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: With both Valencia CF and Rayo Vallecano tied on 39 points in 11th and 12th place after 33 La Liga matchdays, this Mestalla showdown on May 14 carries high stakes in a fierce relegation battle where just five points separate them from the drop zone. Valencia holds a historical edge in head-to-heads but faces a defensive injury crisis with Thierry Correia, Mouctar Diakhaby, Dimitri Foulquier, José Copete, and Julen Agirrezabala sidelined, plus Unai Núñez doubtful, thinning their backline amid inconsistent recent form including a 2-1 win over Girona. Rayo, resilient on the road with 12 draws, contends with absences like Andrei Ratiu, Sergio Camello, and Iván Balliu, while their mid-table security hinges on exploiting Valencia's vulnerabilities in this pivotal late-season clash.

markets.question: Exact Score: Valencia CF 2 - 1 Rayo Vallecano de Madrid?
markets.description: In the upcoming La Liga game between Valencia CF and Rayo Vallecano de Madrid, scheduled for May 14, 2026 at 1:00 PM ET: This market will resolve based on the final score of the Valencia CF vs. Rayo Vallecano de Madrid match originally scheduled for May 14, 2026 at 1:00 PM ET, considering only the result at the end of 90 minutes of regulation plus stoppage time; extra time and penalty shoot-outs are excluded. If the actual score is not one of the explicitly listed outcomes, the market resolves to "Any Other Score." If the match is postponed, the market will remain open until it is completed; if it is canceled with no make-up game, the market resolves to "0-0." The primary resolution source for this market will be the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. eventMetadata.context_description: With Valencia CF hosting Rayo Vallecano in a pivotal La Liga relegation skirmish at Mestalla, trader consensus reflects a razor-tight contest amid high stakes, as Valencia sit on 39 points with a slim 6% descent risk after a 0-2 home loss to Atletico Madrid, while Rayo's crucial 2-0 away triumph at Getafe has all but clinched safety at 42 points. Both sides grapple with injury woes—Valencia without fullbacks Thierry Correia (hamstring) and Dimitri Foulquier (knee), Rayo missing Randy Nteka (muscle) and Álvaro García—disrupting starting XIs and defensive solidity. Head-to-head history favors draws (10 of 23 meetings) with low-scoring trends, compounded by Rayo's dismal away form (winless since October), keeping implied probabilities bunched evenly on outcomes like 1-1, 1-0, and 0-0 as crowds anticipate a cagey, low-goal stalemate.

markets.question: Will the UK designate the IRGC a terrorist organization by June 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the United Kingdom government formally designates the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) as a terrorist organization by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

This includes designation as a proscribed terrorist group or organisation according to the UK Home Office, as well as the use of Royal Prerogative Powers or Orders in Council, legislation signed into law, or the creation of a new national designation that formally designates the IRGC as a terrorist organization.

Statements by government officials, including the Prime Minister, Home Office, or National Crime Service, will not count unless accompanied by a formal designation.

The resolution source will be a consensus of credible reporting or official information from the UK Government.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors no UK proscription of Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) as a terrorist organization by June 30, reflecting procedural hurdles and diplomatic caution despite mounting pressure. The Home Office proscribed list, last updated January 28, excludes the IRGC, a state-backed entity requiring new legislation under the Terrorism Act 2000. Prime Minister Keir Starmer pledged such powers in April following EU designation, tying them to today's King's Speech and the upcoming parliamentary session, but bill passage, debate, and ministerial order face tight timelines. Recent US congressional letters and prior MP calls add urgency, yet historical reluctance over Iran ties sustains skepticism on rapid action.

events.title: Leeds United FC vs. Brighton & Hove Albion FC - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Premier League game, scheduled for May 17 at 10:00 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Leeds United, entrenched in 14th place with 43 points and a secure mid-table position, welcome higher-standing Brighton & Hove Albion (8th, 50 points) to Elland Road on May 17 for a late-season Premier League fixture with minimal stakes beyond momentum. Leeds gained confidence from a 3-1 victory over Burnley on May 1, leveraging their strong home record of 8 wins, 5 draws, and 5 losses, while Brighton suffered a 3-1 defeat at Newcastle on May 2 amid patchy away form. Key absences shape lineups: Leeds without season-ending knee victim Ilia Gruev and thigh-injured Gabriel Gudmundsson (out until late May), plus doubts over Joe Rodon (ankle) and Anton Stach (ligament); Brighton sidelined by Adam Webster (knee until June) and Stefanos Tzimas (ACL), with James Milner, Solly March, and Diego Gomez doubtful as early May returns loom. Brighton hold a dominant head-to-head edge, but Leeds' home advantage and rest could tilt trader consensus.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Denver be 55°F or below on May 15?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Buckley Space Force Base Station in degrees Fahrenheit on 15 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Buckley Space Force Base Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/co/aurora/KBKF.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket assigns a 99.2% implied probability to a highest temperature of 74°F or higher in Denver on May 15, driven by the latest National Weather Service forecasts and model ensembles projecting lows to mid-80s under a dominant upper-level ridge anchored over the Desert Southwest. This pattern delivers strong subsidence—downward motion in the atmosphere that inhibits clouds and enhances warming—pushing temperatures 10–15°F above the mid-May climatological normal of around 70°F at Buckley Space Force Base, the market's resolution station. Recent updates from May 11 confirm sustained warm anomalies with dry conditions. Realistic challenges include unexpected thickening clouds from increasing southerlies or a fast-moving disturbance, though ensemble agreement remains robust; watch NWS Boulder/Denver's afternoon forecast discussion for refinements.

events.title: Odisha FC vs. Punjab FC
events.description: This event is for the upcoming Indian Super League game, scheduled for Saturday, May 16, 2026 between Odisha FC and Punjab FC.

eventMetadata.context_description: Odisha FC holds a slim edge as home side at Kalinga Stadium, but trader consensus prices reflect Punjab FC's stronger recent form offsetting that advantage in a relegation-threatened clash for the Juggernauts. Punjab sit 7th with 14 points from eight matches (4W-2D-2L), fresh off a 3-0 dismantling of Inter Kashi on April 20, showcasing solid defense and counter-attacks, while Odisha languish 11th on six points from eight (1W-3D-4L), stung by a stoppage-time loss to Kerala Blasters on April 23 and a 1-1 draw with Mohammedan. Their February 1-1 head-to-head stalemate underscores the draw's appeal, with no major injuries altering lineups amid both teams' mid-table table positioning and playoff irrelevance.

markets.question: Will the 2026 trade deficit be between 900B and 1T?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the annual US Goods and Services Deficit for 2026, as reported by the US Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA) and the US Census Bureau (USCB) in the “U.S. International Trade in Goods and Services” release for December and Annual 2026, expected to be released in February 2027.

Upon publication, the specified release will be made available at: https://www.bea.gov/news/current-releases

The relevant figure may be found in the annual summary under “Exports, Imports, and Balance (exhibit 1)”. Changes in the BEA or USCB’s reporting format will not disqualify a relevant published figure from counting.

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

The primary resolution source for this market will be the “U.S. International Trade in Goods and Services” release for December and Annual 2026 from the US Bureau of Economic Analysis and the US Census Bureau. If this release is not published by April 30, 2027 ET, another credible source on the annual US Goods and Services Deficit for 2026 will be chosen.

Note: any revisions to the annual US Goods and Services Deficit for 2026 made after the publication of the “U.S. International Trade in Goods and Services” release for December and Annual 2026 will not be considered.

events.description:

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket closely splits between an 800–900B US trade deficit at 38% and 900B–1T at 35.5% for full-year 2026, reflecting persistent structural imbalances amid robust domestic consumer demand and a strong dollar that boost imports despite Trump administration tariffs. The Bureau of Economic Analysis reported the goods and services deficit widened to $60.3 billion in March—up 4.4% from February's revised $57.8 billion—with imports rising faster than exports, annualizing Q1 at around $700 billion but tempered by historical seasonality and 2025's $901 billion total that showed limited tariff impact so far. This keeps the race tight, as delayed supply chain shifts and potential retaliation cloud shrinkage prospects; upcoming April data release in early June, along with further tariff enforcement or dollar movements, could widen the gap toward higher bins if imports accelerate or lower ones if export growth surges.

markets.question: Tshisekedi out as President of the DRC by December 31, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Félix Tshisekedi ceases to be President of the Democratic Republic of the Congo for any period of time between market creation and the specified date (ET). Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

An announcement of Félix Tshisekedi's resignation/removal before this market's end date will immediately resolve this market to "Yes", regardless of when the announced resignation/removal goes into effect.

If the specified individual is detained, effectively removed from the specified position, or otherwise permanently prevented from fulfilling the duties of the specified position within this market’s timeframe, it will qualify for a “Yes” resolution.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from Félix Tshisekedi and the government of the Democratic Republic of the Congo; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: President Félix Tshisekedi's recent May 6 press conference, where he expressed openness to a third term via referendum if voters approve and warned that eastern DRC conflict with Rwanda-backed M23 rebels could delay 2028 presidential elections, has solidified trader consensus at 91.5% against his removal by year-end. Midway through his second constitutional term ending in 2028, Tshisekedi maintains firm control of Kinshasa and key institutions despite opposition outcry from figures like Martin Fayulu accusing him of power-clinging. No verified coups, impeachments, or resignations have emerged in the past 30 days, with ongoing eastern insecurity failing to threaten national leadership. Traders price in low risk of upheaval barring major scandals, military reversals, or health events before December 31.

markets.question: Games Total: O/U 2.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the Rainbow Six Siege Round 5 match between ENTERPRISE Esports and Weibo Gaming in the BLAST R6 Major Salt Lake City Group Stage, initially scheduled for May 13 at 4:45PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Over" if ENTERPRISE Esports and Weibo Gaming play 3 or more games in this series.

If fewer than 3 games are played, this market will resolve to "Under".

Games won by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default are counted towards the total, provided that the match is completed.

If the match is canceled (not played at all for any reason), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's match forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends due to the clinching game being forfeited this will count as a completed match.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/rainbowsix/Main_Page. However, if https://liquipedia.net/rainbowsix/Main_Page has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.title: Rainbow Six Siege: ENTERPRISE Esports vs Weibo Gaming (BO3) - BLAST R6 Major Salt Lake City Group Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Rainbow Six Siege Round 5 match between ENTERPRISE Esports and Weibo Gaming in the BLAST R6 Major Salt Lake City Group Stage, initially scheduled for May 13 at 4:45PM ET.

This market will resolve to "ENTERPRISE Esports" if ENTERPRISE Esports win the match against Weibo Gaming.

This market will resolve to "Weibo Gaming" if Weibo Gaming win the match against ENTERPRISE Esports.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/rainbowsix/Main_Page. However, if https://liquipedia.net/rainbowsix/Main_Page has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: In the BLAST R6 Major Salt Lake City Swiss Stage, ENTERPRISE Esports and Weibo Gaming collide in a high-stakes BO3 at 2-2 records, with the winner bolstering playoff aspirations among the top 8 advancers and the loser facing elimination risk. ENTERPRISE impressed early, upsetting Ninjas in Pyjamas and Team Falcons while dropping a tight decision to G2 Esports, showcasing Oceania's resilience against elite EML and SAL squads. Weibo Gaming grinded out a key victory over All Gamers but stumbled versus Twisted Minds and Virtus.pro, mirroring their APAC struggles internationally. Weibo holds the edge from a 3-1 Swiss Stage win over ENTERPRISE at last year's Munich Major, amid stable rosters and no notable patch impacts.

events.title: Deportivo Alavés vs. FC Barcelona - Player Props
events.description: Goal scorers for the La Liga game between Deportivo Alavés and FC Barcelona, scheduled for May 13, 2026 at 3:30 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Barcelona, already crowned La Liga champions with 91 points from 35 matches and a dominant five-game winning streak including a 2-0 victory over Real Madrid, face potential rotations in their visit to relegation-threatened Alavés (18th, 37 points), who drew a vital point against rival Elche last outing amid mixed DDLWL form. Key absences shape player props: Barcelona without top scorer Lamine Yamal (16 goals) due to injury and suspended Raphinha, spotlighting Lewandowski (13 goals, recent form) and Dani Olmo; Alavés missing leading marksmen Toni Martínez (12 goals) and Lucas Boyé (11 goals) to injury, plus suspended Facundo Garcés and injured Jon Guridi, boosting props for Barcelona midfielders like Pedri and Gavi against a depleted home defense at Mendizorroza. Historical head-to-head favors Barcelona heavily (17 wins in 20).
